title: Countdown Timer

statement.markdown:
## Countdown Timer
The countdown timer will decrement every second until it reaches zero and then reset to 10 seconds.

constraints: The countdown timer will start at 10 seconds when the user clicks the start button.
The countdown timer will decrement every second.
The countdown timer will reach zero and then reset to 10 seconds.
The start and reset buttons will be enabled/disabled as necessary.
